about.subtitle: We make a difference in the lighting industry with our vision and mission

about.description2: With our expert engineering team and state-of-the-art equipment, we aim to provide the highest quality service to our customers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To maintain customer satisfaction at the highest level with sustainable, innovative and aesthetic lighting solutions, contribute to energy efficiency and be a pioneer in the industry.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a global brand that is referenced in smart lighting systems in Turkey and the world, combining technology and design, producing sustainable solutions.

slides.title: In Lighting Engineering
slides.description: With over 20 years of experience, as Turkey's leading lighting engineering company, we offer energy-efficient, eco-friendly, and aesthetic lighting solutions.

slides.title: Electrical Contracting
slides.description: We power your space with modern systems and stand by you at every stage, from design to implementation.

slides.title: Smart Lighting
slides.description: With advanced automation systems like DALI, DMX, and KNX, we increase energy efficiency and maximize ease of use.

slides.title: Facade Lighting
slides.description: Energy-efficient LED facade lighting systems that highlight the architectural features of buildings. Add value to your buildings at night.

slides.title: Landscape Lighting
slides.description: Eco-friendly LED lighting solutions for gardens, parks, and open areas. Energy-efficient systems that preserve natural beauty.

slides.title: Industrial Lighting
slides.description: Professional lighting systems for industrial facilities, factories, and warehouses. High durability, optimal lighting, and safety.

facade-lighting.title: Facade Lighting
facade-lighting.shortDescription: Aesthetics and energy efficiency with custom LED lighting solutions for modern building facades.
facade-lighting.fullDescription: Our facade lighting solutions transform buildings into architectural masterpieces after dark. We combine aesthetics with energy efficiency using state-of-the-art LED technology. Whether it's a corporate headquarters, hotel, or residential complex, our custom designs highlight the unique architectural features of any structure.

faq.question: How long does installation take?
faq.answer: Installation typically takes 2-4 weeks depending on building size and complexity.

faq.question: What is the lifespan of LED systems?
faq.answer: Our LED systems last 50,000+ hours (approx. 10-15 years with normal use).

industrial-lighting.title: Industrial Lighting
industrial-lighting.shortDescription: Professional lighting systems for factories, warehouses and industrial facilities.
industrial-lighting.fullDescription: Industrial environments demand robust, high-performance lighting solutions. Our industrial lighting systems are designed to withstand harsh conditions while providing optimal illumination for safety and productivity. From high-bay LED fixtures to explosion-proof lighting, we have solutions for every industrial application.

faq.question: Are these suitable for cold storage?
faq.answer: Yes, our fixtures operate efficiently down to -40°C.

landscape-lighting.title: Landscape Lighting
landscape-lighting.shortDescription: Environmentally friendly LED lighting solutions for gardens, parks and open areas.
landscape-lighting.fullDescription: Create stunning outdoor environments with our landscape lighting solutions. We specialize in environmentally friendly LED systems that enhance natural beauty while minimizing light pollution. Perfect for parks, gardens, pathways, and architectural landscaping features.

faq.question: Are these safe for wet areas?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide IP67 and IP68 rated fixtures for fountains and water features.

road-lighting.title: Road Lighting
road-lighting.shortDescription: Safe and economical lighting systems for urban and intercity roads.
road-lighting.fullDescription: Ensure safe roadways with our professional road lighting solutions. Our systems meet international standards for illumination levels while reducing energy consumption. We provide complete solutions for highways, urban streets, tunnels, and pedestrian crossings.

faq.question: How is maintenance handled?
faq.answer: We offer remote monitoring and scheduled maintenance contracts.

energy-solutions.title: Energy Solutions
energy-solutions.shortDescription: Lighting systems integrated with renewable energy sources.
energy-solutions.fullDescription: Reduce your carbon footprint with our renewable energy integrated lighting solutions. We combine solar, wind, and energy storage technologies with efficient LED lighting to create truly sustainable systems. Perfect for off-grid applications and organizations committed to net-zero goals.

faq.question: What happens on cloudy days?
faq.answer: Battery storage provides 3-5 days of backup power.

smart-systems.title: Smart Systems
smart-systems.shortDescription: IoT-based smart lighting control and management systems.
smart-systems.fullDescription: Transform your lighting into an intelligent network with our IoT-based smart systems. Real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and automated control reduce operational costs while maximizing efficiency. Integrate with existing BMS, HVAC, and security systems for complete building automation.

faq.question: Is this compatible with existing systems?
faq.answer: Yes, our open API integrates with major BMS platforms.

common.contactForQuote: Contact us for a free consultation and quote
